text.title: sql-optimization Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the sql-optimization methodology end-to-end.

step.name: rank-queries-by-impact
step.action: Sort by total_time = mean_time * calls; pick top 5.

step.name: capture-explain-baseline
step.action: Run EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) on production-sized data; record output.

step.name: propose-changes
step.action: Author composite / covering / partial indexes + query rewrites; explicit columns instead of SELECT *.
step.decision-gate: If write workload is heavy, weigh index cost before adding.

step.name: apply-and-remeasure
step.action: Apply to staging; re-run EXPLAIN ANALYZE; capture after numbers.

step.name: synthesize-report
step.action: Compose Markdown + JSON report; validate against schema.
